name: Apprisen - Cccs Of Central Ohio, Inc.
description_short: 501(c)(3) non-profit credit counseling agency offering debt management, financial education, and personalized budgeting. CCCS affiliate with 70+ years serving central Ohio residents.
description_long:
Apprisen (CCCS of Central Ohio, Inc.) is an established 501(c)(3) non-profit organization with over 70 years of experience providing debt solutions and financial counseling. The organization operates as part of the broader CCCS network and serves consumers seeking professional guidance without commercial debt-relief schemes or predatory lending.

The company offers comprehensive financial services including credit health education sessions, Debt Management Programs (DMP) that negotiate with creditors to lower interest rates and monthly payments, and Financial Health Plans focused on budgeting and savings. Their digital intake system called IRIS allows clients to securely share financial information and receive a debt snapshot within 24 hours, followed by personalized roadmaps created by their Financial Specialist team.

Apprisen distinguishes itself through its non-profit status, BBB A+ rating (as of January 2023), recognition as "Best Overall Credit Counseling Agency" by Investopedia, and emphasis on non-judgmental, compassionate service. Client testimonials highlight the professionalism and knowledge of their Financial Specialists, with customers praising their ability to listen, provide practical guidance, and help shift mindsets around debt and financial wellness.

As a non-profit CCCS member, Apprisen is constrained to educational and counseling services rather than aggressive debt settlement. Their DMP approach works cooperatively with creditors rather than challenging credit report accuracy. Clients seeking credit repair or debt settlement may need alternative services. The organization's service area appears focused on central Ohio residents based on its regional designation.
pros: 501(c)(3) non-profit status ensures mission-driven service without profit motive
BBB A+ rating as of January 2023 demonstrates accountability and consumer protection
Investopedia recognition as "Best Overall Credit Counseling Agency" provides third-party validation
IRIS digital system provides debt snapshot within 24 hours and secure financial intake
Debt Management Program negotiates directly with creditors to reduce interest rates and monthly payments
70+ years of operational history indicates organizational stability and expertise
Multiple client testimonials (2025) confirm responsive, knowledgeable, and compassionate financial specialists
cons: Non-profit model limits services to counseling and management; cannot provide credit dispute/repair like commercial agencies
Service area appears regionally limited to central Ohio despite national CCCS network
DMP approach requires creditor cooperation and extended repayment timeline, not suitable for urgent debt settlement needs
Website does not disclose specific service fees, making cost comparison difficult
No mention of bankruptcy counseling or housing counselor certification (HUD) despite free-help category advantages
best_for: Consumers with multiple debts seeking structured repayment plans with creditor negotiation
First-time credit counseling clients intimidated by their credit reports or financial situation
Central Ohio residents with stable income who can commit to multi-year Debt Management Programs
Individuals needing budgeting education and overall financial wellness planning, not emergency cash
diagnosis: Apprisen is best for central Ohio consumers struggling with multiple debts who want professional, non-judgmental counseling and creditor negotiation through a reputable non-profit. The main caveat is that this is not a quick-fix debt settlement service and requires client commitment to structured multi-year repayment plans; those seeking credit dispute services or immediate debt reduction should look elsewhere.
services: Credit Health Education Sessions - understand and improve credit reports
Debt Management Program (DMP) - creditor negotiation for reduced interest rates and payments
Financial Health Plan - cash-flow budgeting, savings planning, financial wellness
IRIS Digital Financial Assessment - secure intake and personalized debt snapshot
Financial Roadmap Development - customized action plans with budget and debt analysis
One-on-One Financial Specialist Consultation - personalized review of financial roadmap
Ongoing DMP Account Management - monthly monitoring and creditor coordination
Financial Education and Counseling - debt solutions guidance
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
meta_description: CCCS of Central Ohio is a 501(c)(3) non-profit offering debt management and financial education.
